name: Survivor Growth Arena
summary: A top-down survival arena with movement, aiming, rising waves, upgrade choices, death and restart.
llm1Card: Survive escalating arena waves, reposition, shoot threats, and choose upgrades that change the next phase.

targetPlan: create scene name={{scene}} first=true
create object name=Survivor type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=32 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Threat type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#DD4455 width=28 height=28 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Shot type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FFE066 width=10 height=6 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Upgrade type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#55DD88 width=24 height=24 scene={{scene}}
create object name=UpgradeSpeed type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#AA66EE width=24 height=24 scene={{scene}}
create object name=Hud type=Text size=20 scene={{scene}}
set variable name=Wave value=1 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=Power value=1 type=Number scope=global
place object=Survivor at=400,300 scene={{scene}}
place object=Hud at=16,16 scene={{scene}}
on key ArrowUp held -> move Survivor y=-4 scene={{scene}}
on key ArrowDown held -> move Survivor y=+4 scene={{scene}}
on key ArrowLeft held -> move Survivor x=-4 scene={{scene}}
on key ArrowRight held -> move Survivor x=+4 scene={{scene}}
on key Space -> spawn Shot at 420 300 scene={{scene}}
on collision Shot Threat -> destroy Shot, destroy Threat scene={{scene}}
every 3s -> spawn Threat at 760 300 scene={{scene}}
every 12s -> spawn Upgrade at 340 180 scene={{scene}}
every 12s -> spawn UpgradeSpeed at 460 180 scene={{scene}}
on collision Survivor Upgrade -> destroy Upgrade, variable Power = 2 scene={{scene}}
on collision Survivor UpgradeSpeed -> destroy UpgradeSpeed, variable Power = 3 scene={{scene}}
on collision Survivor Threat -> {{failAction}} scene={{scene}}
on start -> text Hud Survive scene={{scene}}

capabilities.name: Survivor growth loop
capabilities.summary: Move, fire, survive waves and gain upgrades.
